item.action: Preserve the project's shift from stateless acceptance validation to durable one-time acceptance consumption, including its production-integration limits.
required_evidence: unresolved production integration and crash-recovery route

progress.source_scope: public repository files and commit metadata only
progress.privacy_boundary: raw private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, account identifiers, and unreviewed uploads excluded
progress.verification: Artifact created through the GitHub contents API; fetch-back and JSON parse verification required before final acceptance.

item.handoff: Frontier Research or the owning runtime team should trace production acceptance-success call sites, prove durable ledger invocation before success, and test restart, abrupt termination, and stale-lock recovery on the actual hosting substrate.

merge_rule: Append or reconcile this owner-scoped record without replacing queue records owned by other teams.
